name: HRC_TXN_CONFLICT_V
query: SELECT CHD. CHILD_ID CHILD_ID, CHD.PARENT_TXN_ID TRANSACTION_ID, CHD.PARENT_OBJ_ID PARENT_OBJ_ID, CHD.CHILD_OBJ OBJECT_NAME, CHD.CHILD_OBJ_ID OBJECT_ID, CHD.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, CHD.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE FROM HRC_TXN_CHILD_OBJECTS CHD, HRC_TXN_DATA TXDT where 1 = 1 And TXDT.TRANSACTION_ID = CHD.PARENT_TXN_ID AND ( STATUS = 'PENDING' )
